title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICÂ­IPALITY OF SABANI, PROVINCE OF NUEVA ECIJA, TO GABALDON.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2946 / 51 OG No. 7, 3391 (July, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1318, June 16, 1955 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICÂIPALITY OF SABANI, PROVINCE OF NUEVA ECIJA, TO GABALDON.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Sabani, Province of Nueva Ecija, is hereby changed to Gabaldon.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1955.
